mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crawler_config ( pk_id, config_name, target_url, request_method, request_headers, request_body, pre_processor, post_processor, cron_expression, enabled, description, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{pkId}, #{configName}, #{targetUrl}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestHeaders}, #{requestBody}, #{preProcessor}, #{postProcessor}, #{cronExpression}, #{enabled}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE crawler_config SET config_name = #{configName}, target_url = #{targetUrl}, request_method = #{requestMethod}, request_headers = #{requestHeaders}, request_body = #{requestBody}, pre_processor = #{preProcessor}, post_processor = #{postProcessor}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, update_time = NOW() WHERE pk_id = #{pkId}
mapper.select: SELECT pk_id, config_name, target_url, request_method, request_headers, request_body, pre_processor, post_processor, cron_expression, enabled, description, create_time, update_time FROM crawler_config WHERE pk_id = #{pkId}

SELECT pk_id, config_name, target_url, request_method, request_headers, request_body, pre_processor, post_processor, cron_expression, enabled, description, create_time, update_time FROM crawler_config ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT pk_id, config_name, target_url, request_method, request_headers, request_body, pre_processor, post_processor, cron_expression, enabled, description, create_time, update_time FROM crawler_config WHERE enabled = #{enabled} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT pk_id, config_id, config_name, execute_time, status, result_data, error_message, duration FROM crawler_record WHERE config_id = #{configId} ORDER BY execute_time DESC
SELECT pk_id, config_id, config_name, execute_time, status, result_data, error_message, duration FROM crawler_record ORDER BY execute_time DESC

SELECT pk_id, config_id, config_name, execute_time, status, result_data, error_message, duration FROM crawler_record WHERE config_id = #{configId} AND status = 'SUCCESS' ORDER BY execute_time DESC LIMIT 1
